name: CloudMetrics
description: Infrastructure monitoring and observability platform. Real-time metrics, alerting, and dashboards for cloud-native applications. Supports AWS, GCP, Azure, and Kubernetes.

capabilities.name: query_metrics
capabilities.description: Query time-series metrics with flexible filters, aggregations, and time ranges. Supports PromQL-compatible syntax.

capabilities.name: list_alerts
capabilities.description: View active, resolved, and muted alerts across all monitored services.

capabilities.name: create_alert
capabilities.description: Create a new alert rule based on metric thresholds, anomaly detection, or composite conditions.

capabilities.name: subscribe_alerts
capabilities.description: Subscribe to real-time alert notifications via webhook or SSE. Agent receives immediate notification when alerts fire.

capabilities.name: get_service_health
capabilities.description: Get current health status and SLA metrics for any monitored service.

business_policies.data_retention: Metrics retained for plan duration (30 days free, 13 months pro, unlimited enterprise).

brand_voice.tone: technical, precise, helpful. We're engineers talking to engineers.
